name: Juan Gaviria
title: Full Stack Software Developer
summary: Experienced Full Stack Developer with a strong background in building scalable web applications using modern technologies. Proficient in TypeScript, React, Node.js, and cloud services. Passionate about clean code, performance optimization, and mentoring junior developers.

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
highlights: Led development of a microservices architecture serving 50K+ daily active users, reducing API response times by 40%
Designed and implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, cutting deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes
Mentored a team of 4 junior developers through code reviews and pair programming sessions

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
highlights: Built a real-time dashboard using React, TypeScript, and WebSockets, handling 10K concurrent connections
Developed RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express, integrated with PostgreSQL and Redis caching layer
Improved application performance by implementing lazy loading and code splitting, reducing initial load time by 60%

experience.title: Junior Developer
highlights: Developed and maintained 10+ client-facing web applications using React and Vue.js
Implemented responsive designs from Figma mockups with pixel-perfect accuracy
Wrote unit and integration tests achieving 85% code coverage across projects
